pattern: If a component labeled (1), or a component id ending in _1, has values only at VU levels 92/96/100, the parser probably attached a VU addition to the primary base effect.
resolution: Add review reason primary_labeled_effect_vu_only_needs_review and show it in the HTML suspicious section. Treat it as a parser alignment failure by default unless the detail page explicitly says the main (1) effect is VU-only.

pattern: Large ingestion batches need repeated run -> agent review -> parser fix -> rerun -> agent review -> manual final review cycles, and this state must be recoverable by another AI.
resolution: Add review_cycle_controller.py to run/summarize a batch, write data/agent_runs/<batch>_cycle_state.json, and generate a bounded Batch Review Expert prompt from report/JSONL paths and blocking items.
